name: golang-github-rs-xid-dev
title: golang-github-rs-xid-dev
summary: globally unique id generator thought for the web
description:
globally unique id generator thought for the web
package xid is a globally unique id generator library, ready
to be used safely directly in your server code.
.
Xid is using Mongo Object ID algorithm to generate globally
unique ids with a different serialization (bast64) to make
it shorter when transported as a string.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-rs-xid-dev because globally unique id generator thought for the web.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-rs-xid-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-rs-xid-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-rs-xid-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
